summary: Clarify secondary dashboard summary metrics with explicit summary-only treatment and a real Global Admin audit shortcut on Site Dashboard Recent Activity.
selectedReason: Current repo evidence showed that primary dashboard metrics already used real drill-downs or visible summary-only treatment, but the Site/Admin summary strips still relied on prose alone for passive counts. Site Dashboard Recent Activity also told Global Admin users that Audit was available without exposing a direct action, so the safest high-value slice was to reuse the existing Audit section and tighten the summary-strip fallback without inventing routes or broadening access.

candidates.candidate: Dashboard summary-strip clarity and Global Admin audit shortcut

candidates.decision: rejected: current count tracks evidence artifacts and no exact site-scoped evidence-record surface exists
rejected: current admin count tracks approved submissions, not a proven one-click student list denominator
deferred: no exact current destination is proven for that follow-up row
deferred: note visibility semantics still need route/data confirmation
not selected: lower value than fixing active summary-strip ambiguity with a real action
deferred: hosted runtime is outside this local batch
deferred: backend queue rows are still absent
deferred: broader multi-surface verification batch than this local slice
not selected: copy cleanup is lower product value than a route-backed dashboard clarification

nextRecommended: Inspect student-detail note visibility labels only if the current detail route already distinguishes staff-only versus student-visible notes; otherwise keep Program Teacher mentor-meeting follow-up summary-only until a precise scoped destination exists.
doNotRepeat: Do not add fake dashboard drill-downs for Evidence or Approved summary counts when the current denominators do not map to an exact backed destination.
Do not expose the Site Dashboard Recent Activity Audit shortcut to site-scoped, read-only, or other roles that still lack the Audit section.
Do not drop explicit Summary only treatment from passive dashboard summary-strip counts while those metrics remain non-clickable.
